stories.title: Austrian GP Opens — Red Bull's Biggest Upgrade and Last-Ditch Effort to Keep Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Red Bull arrives at Austria with their biggest upgrade of 2026 — new sidepod profile + revised floor. Weight target met at 768kg. Verstappen has 6 wins at the Red Bull Ring. This is their last-ditch effort. 🏁 #F1Fanrecap #AustrianGP #RedBull

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: That Red Bull Ring exit clause isn't just rumor — it activates at summer break. No. 1 driver in the world, biggest home upgrade, highest-stakes race in years. Austria this weekend is must-watch F1. #F1Fanrecap #AustrianGP #F1

article.headline: Red Bull Brings Their Biggest Upgrade of 2026 to Austria — With Verstappen's Future Riding on It

stories.title: Antonelli vs Hamilton — Championship Math at Austria

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Championship standings heading into Austria: Antonelli 156 pts. Hamilton 115 pts. That's a 41-point gap with 15 races left. Hamilton needs a 2.7-pt/race swing just to stay alive. The math is brutal. #F1Fanrecap #F1 #AustrianGP

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Hamilton's 106th win in Barcelona was Ferrari's first under him. Russell sits No. 3 at 106 pts — only 9 behind Hamilton. The title fight isn't over but Austria could define who's really chasing Antonelli. #F1Fanrecap #Ferrari #Mercedes

stories.title: Verstappen's Summer Break Decision — The Exit Clause Activates

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Verstappen's exit clause triggers at summer break. Red Bull shareholders are split — Thai faction vs. Mateschitz estate. Mercedes is the frontrunner. Retirement hasn't been ruled out. Austria just became a lot more than a race. #F1Fanrecap #F1 #Verstappen

stories.title: Mercedes W17 Diffuser Ban Takes Effect at Austrian GP

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: The FIA has banned Mercedes' serrated diffuser effective this weekend in Austria. Ferrari triggered the protest — and already had an approved alternative ready. Mercedes' freight was en route when the ruling landed. #F1Fanrecap #AustrianGP #Mercedes

stories.title: Cadillac F1 — 0 Points, 7 Races, Their Biggest Upgrade Yet

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Cadillac F1: 7 races, 0 points. Their Austrian GP upgrade specifically targets a rear instability issue causing a performance cliff around lap 15. The margin for error is gone. #F1Fanrecap #AustrianGP #CadillacF1
